zh.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt是Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt和Isabel De Mohun的女兒，於1268年出生在英國史洛普爾維林頓。她於大約1287年與William de Bermingham在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1324年在英國越可爾衛克菲德享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt是Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt和Isabel De Mohun的女儿，于1268年出生在英国史洛普爾維林頓。她于大约1287年与William de Bermingham在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1324年在英国越可爾衛克菲德享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾斯普洛特布盧 安德 庫斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt was born in 1268, in Wellington, Shropshire, England as the daughter of Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt and Isabel De Mohun. She married William de Bermingham about 1287, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1324, in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt est née en 1268, à Wellington, Shropshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt et Isabel De Mohun. Elle a épousé William de Bermingham environ 1287, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1324, à Wakefield, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt wurde 1268 in Wellington, Shropshire, England, als Tochter von Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt und Isabel De Mohun geboren. Sie hat um 1287 in England, United Kingdom William de Bermingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1324 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Wakefield, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt è nata il nel 1268 nel Wellington, Shropshire, England come figlia di Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt e Isabel De Mohun. Lei sposato William de Bermingham circa 1287, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1324, nel Wakefield, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourtは1268年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアウエリントンでSir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of EyncourtとIsabel De Mohunの娘として生まれた。約1287年にイギリスイギリスでWilliam de Berminghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1324年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワケフィールドで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアスプロトブロウ アンド クウスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스플로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스
ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt(은)는 1268년 영국 슈럽실르 웰잉턴에서 Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt(와)과 Isabel De Mohun의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드에서 William de Bermingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1324년 영국 요르크실르 웨이크필드에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 스플로트브루그h 앤드 커스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt nasceu em 1268, em Wellington, Shropshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt e Isabel De Mohun. Ela casou-se com William de Bermingham aproximadamente 1287, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1324, em Wakefield, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Sprotbrough and Cusworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Spotbrough, Yorkshire, England: спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Matilda Deincourt родилась в 1268 г. в местности веллингтон, шропшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Edmund Deincourt 8th Lord Of Eyncourt и Isabel De Mohun. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Bermingham около 1287 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1324 г. в местности веикефиелд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности спротброую анд кусворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
